arts.ttl: Nice end PSG's hopes of unbeaten Ligue 1 season
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain's hopes of becoming the first side to complete a Ligue 1 season unbeaten came crashing down at the Parc des Princes on Friday when Nice handed them their first defeat of the league campaign.

arts.ttl: PSG’s hopes of unbeaten Ligue 1 season dashed by Nice before Arsenal trip
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s hopes of becoming the first side to complete a Ligue 1 season unbeaten came crashing down at the Parc des Princes on Friday when Nice handed them their first defeat of the league campaign, winning 3-1 to boost their own Champions League ambitions. Having already secured the title earlier this month, PSG still top the Ligue 1 standings on 78 points, while Nice move up to fourth on 54. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PSG 1-3 Nice: Parisians suffer first defeat of season and lose record unbeaten run
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain slipped to their first defeat of the Ligue 1 season at home to Nice on Friday. Ex- Aston Villa midfielder Morgan Sanson scored two goals, including a superb acrobatic volley, as Les Parisiens slipped to an uncharacteristic defeat under the lights at the Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | PSG 1-3 Nice: Ligue 1 champions lose unbeaten record ahead of Champions League clash against Arsenal
arts.sum: Ligue 1 McDonald’s, Round 31, 25/04/25 PSG have lost their first game of the domestic campaign, failing to complete an unbeaten season. Nice made the most of PSG’s shortcomings at…
